name: cclens
description: Skills for driving cclens — analyze Claude Code usage, get a health check, act on the findings, and query the store — from inside a Claude Code session.

plugins.name: cclens
plugins.description: Use cclens from Claude Code: /cclens:summary (health check), /cclens:optimize (investigate findings and propose config fixes), /cclens:query (ad-hoc SQL over the usage store).
